desc: Iron ores and concentrates, non-agglomerated
notes: Canada is a net exporter; MFN import duty is free.

desc: Iron ore pellets (agglomerated iron ores and concentrates)
notes: Iron ore pellets produced in Labrador/Quebec. MFN duty free.

desc: Silicon (polycrystalline; other than metallurgical or electrical grade)
notes: Silicon for semiconductor use. Certificate of origin required for FTA preferential rates.

desc: Natural uranium and its compounds; alloys, dispersions, ceramic products and mixtures
notes: Uranium exports subject to Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty licensing. CNSC permit required.

desc: Rare earth metals, scandium and yttrium compounds
notes: Subject to export controls for certain end uses under the Export and Import Permits Act.

desc: Petroleum oils and oils obtained from bituminous minerals, crude
notes: Crude oil. NEB export licence required for crude oil exports from Canada.

desc: Propane, liquefied (petroleum gases and other gaseous hydrocarbons)
notes: LPG — propane. Western Canada exports significant volumes to Asia via LPG terminals.

desc: Natural gas in gaseous state
notes: Piped natural gas. Canada Gas Act and NEB export licences apply. LNG classified separately under 2711.11.

desc: Flat-rolled products of iron or non-alloy steel, >4.75mm thick, not further worked
notes: Note: US Section 232 25% tariff applies on Canadian steel exports to the US despite CUSMA. This table shows Canadian import rates.

desc: Flat-rolled iron or non-alloy steel, hot-rolled, in coils, not clad, plated or coated, >10mm
notes: Hot-rolled steel coil. Canada is a net importer of some steel products from CUSMA partners.

desc: Unwrought aluminum, not alloyed
notes: Primary aluminum. Canada's MFN rate: 6%. All FTA partners: Free. US Section 232 25% tariff applies on Canadian aluminum exports to the US.

desc: Unwrought aluminum alloys
notes: Aluminum alloys (ingots, T-bars). Canada is the world's 4th largest aluminum producer. MFN rate 6%; FTA rate: Free.

desc: Low erucic acid rape or colza seeds (canola seed)
notes: Canola seed. For Canadian canola exports to China, China's tariff was 15% as of March 2026 (canola oil remains at 100%).

desc: Other rape or colza seeds
notes: High erucic acid rapeseed and other varieties. Industrial uses (lubricants, biofuels). MFN: Free.

desc: Durum wheat, seed quality
notes: Canadian hard red spring and durum wheat. Canada is the world's largest durum wheat exporter. TRQ system may apply in some export markets.

desc: Other wheat and meslin (non-durum, non-seed)
notes: Hard red spring wheat. Canadian Wheat Board regime ended 2012; all varieties now sold at market.

desc: Frozen boneless bovine meat
notes: Frozen boneless beef. Canada's MFN rate: 26.5%. Significant preferential reductions under all FTAs. CPTPP beef tariff eliminated 2026.

desc: Aeroplanes and other powered aircraft (unladen weight >15,000 kg)
notes: Large commercial aircraft. Free under WTO Civil Aircraft Agreement. No country applies significant tariffs on large civil aircraft.

desc: Aeroplanes and other powered aircraft (unladen weight 2,000–15,000 kg)
notes: Regional turboprop/jet aircraft (Bombardier Q400/CRJ class). Free under WTO Aircraft Agreement and all FTAs.

desc: Other parts of aeroplanes or helicopters
notes: Aircraft parts. Free under WTO Civil Aircraft Agreement. Parts must meet airworthiness certification.

desc: Diodes (excluding photosensitive or light-emitting diodes)
notes: Semiconductor diodes. Free under WTO Information Technology Agreement (ITA). Some products subject to dual-use export controls.

desc: Photosensitive semiconductor devices; solar cells
notes: Solar PV cells and modules. Free under ITA.

desc: Portable automatic data processing machines (laptops, notebooks, tablets)
notes: Laptops, tablets. Duty-free globally under WTO ITA. No tariff in Canada or any major trading partner.

desc: Processors and controllers (electronic integrated circuits)
notes: CPUs, MCUs, DSPs. Free under WTO ITA. Advanced chips subject to US BIS export controls restricting supply to certain entities and countries.

desc: Machines for the reception, conversion and transmission or regeneration of voice, images or data (base stations)
notes: 5G base stations and telecommunications equipment. Free under ITA. Equipment from sanctioned suppliers may be restricted under Canadian national security review.
